description.ko: 미니멀한 기하학적 구조와 디지털 카오스의 첨단 결합인 KURO-X는 칠흑 같은 캔버스 위에 날카로운 각도와 네온 아티팩트를 통해 시스템 오류의 미학을 탐구합니다.
description.en: A high-tech fusion of minimalist geometry and digital chaos, KURO-X explores the beauty of system errors through sharp angles and neon artifacts against a void-black canvas.

prompt: Cyberpunk KURO-X aesthetic, geometric glitch art, fragmented 3D polygons, sharp triangular shards, digital data corruption, chromatic aberration, neon cyan and magenta accents, deep matte black background, minimalist vector distortion, high-tech interface elements, 8k resolution, architectural precision meeting digital chaos.
